disclaimer: Curated issue-spotting notes only. This is not legal advice and does not replace lawyer review.

notes.warning: Penalty, liquidated damages, and bond recovery should be checked for reasonableness and proof of loss where applicable.
notes.recommended_check: Ask whether the amount reflects genuine loss, actual training cost, or a reasonable pre-estimate.

notes.warning: Employment bond clauses should be reviewed for reasonableness, actual training-cost basis, and restraint-of-trade concerns.
notes.recommended_check: Check pro-rata reduction, itemized training cost, and whether the employee can exit if employer breaches.

notes.warning: Post-termination non-compete restrictions in India require careful review and may be difficult to enforce depending on facts.
notes.recommended_check: Check duration, geography, business scope, role scope, and whether it is really confidentiality/non-solicit instead.

notes.warning: Arbitration clauses should specify seat/place, number of arbitrators, procedure, language, and interim relief/court jurisdiction where needed.
notes.recommended_check: Check seat, venue, governing law, appointment process, cost allocation, and interim relief.

notes.warning: Rental/lease documents may require stamp duty and registration depending on duration, state, and local law.
notes.recommended_check: Check state-specific stamp duty, registration requirement, lease term, and possession/handover proof.

notes.warning: Contracts involving personal data should define processing purpose, security safeguards, breach notification, subprocessors, and deletion/return.
notes.recommended_check: Check whether a DPA or security annexure exists and whether data is returned/deleted after termination.
